# MealCraft Completion Checklist

## Authentication

- [ ] User registration works
- [ ] User login works
- [ ] User logout works
- [ ] Protected routes function properly

## Recipe CRUD

- [ ] Create recipe
- [ ] Read recipe
- [ ] Update recipe
- [ ] Delete recipe

## Shopping Lists

- [ ] Generate list
- [ ] Display list
- [ ] Merge duplicate ingredients

## Database

- [ ] MongoDB connected
- [ ] Data persists correctly

## UI

- [ ] Responsive design
- [ ] Navigation works
- [ ] Forms validate correctly

## Security

- [ ] Authorization checks implemented
- [ ] User data protected

## Deployment

- [ ] Production build succeeds
- [ ] Application deployed to Vercel

## WDD430 Requirements

- [ ] CRUD implemented
- [ ] Authentication implemented
- [ ] Responsive design implemented
- [ ] Database integration complete
